alerts.coversBody: Steam games fetch artwork automatically. For Epic and manual profiles, click Cover on the game card.

header.title: Game library
header.subtitle: Steam · Epic · Unreal Engine · manual add

dialogs.installFolder: Select Unreal Engine game install folder
dialogs.configFolder: Select the game's config folder: Saved/Config/Windows or WindowsNoEditor

configHelp.title: How to set the config path
configHelp.body: The Set config button should point to the folder where Unreal Engine stores ini files, not to the game install folder. Pick a folder inside Saved/Config.
configHelp.pickFolder: In the folder picker, open the game's user profile config directory and select the Windows, WindowsNoEditor, WinGDK, or WindowsClient folder itself.
configHelp.gameLaunchHint: If Saved/Config does not exist yet, launch the game once, change any setting in the menu, then close it – Unreal will create the ini files.

search.placeholder: Search or type a name to add manually…

empty.tryAnother: Try another name or add a game manually.
empty.scanOrAddPrefix: Click Scan or Add to point at an Unreal Engine install folder (Shipping.exe).
